title: PowerSEPT's Vanilla Essentials
description:
EN : Small and practical client-side modpack.
FR : Petit modpack client-side pratique.
body:
PowerSEPT's Vanilla Essentials is a client-side that I made for myself, to make everything easier when I'm creating a new instance. As it was made primairly for a personal usage, it contains my keybinds and some default mod config files, if you use my modpack you may have to rebind some keys and change some options.

28.01.26 : 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 are supported, I will update it to 26.1, but I'm not planning on updating everytime a game drop releases.

<details>
<summary>Some keybinds that I use</summary>
- Drop : X
- Elytra Time Left : F7
- Calculator : K
- Notes : L
- Cycle hotbar slot left : Button 4
- Cycle hotbar slot right : Butter 5
- Waypoints menu : N
- Toggle in-game Waypoints : F4
- Open World Map : Z
- Sprint : Q

Also, I disabled many keybinds that I think are useless, like Advancements menu or most of Xaeros Minimap shortcuts.

</details>

In the mods list, you can see that Xaeros Minimap is installed. I disabled the minimap by default, because I don't like having the minimap on my screen.

Mods list :
